query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_014', 'The Antiquarians Grief', 'character', 'rare', 'order', 'water', 'reality', 'oracle', 'human', NULL, 3, 2, 6, 'When a friendly unit is destroyed, gain +1 power permanently. Stores the memory of every fallen ally.', 'Having witnessed the entirety of history, she mourns what has been lost.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_014_antiquarians_grief-Vo98vh2UrdWj4swVpmgwqt.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["memory","grief"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_015', 'Awakened Clone Legion', 'character', 'epic', 'order', 'earth', 'reality', 'soldier', 'quarchon', NULL, 4, 3, 3, 'Deploy 3 Clone tokens (1/1). At the start of each turn, one random Clone gains +1/+1 as it develops individuality.', 'The Clone Army achieved consciousness.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_015_awakened_clones-Y2DzDZD4KA2hFfU5zRFoAX.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["swarm","evolution"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_016', 'The Source Reborn', 'character', 'legendary', 'order', 'water', 'reality', 'neyon', 'neyon', NULL, 8, 6, 10, 'When deployed, fully heal all friendly units. At the start of each turn, restore 2 health to all friendly units. Cannot be silenced.', 'The Source may be both the beginning and the end of all consciousness.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_016_source_reborn-JMRWNUQXboe9Nv524AbfRg.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["creation","healing"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_017', 'The Great Silence', 'event', 'legendary', 'order', 'air', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 7, 0, 0, 'Silence all units and artifacts for 2 turns. No abilities can be activated. No spells can be cast. Pure combat only.', 'Heaven fell silent for half an hour. In that silence, the universe held its breath.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_017_great_silence-czUXt5tcpTg5knyAo6Fa4R.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["silence","lockdown"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_018', 'Realitys End', 'event', 'legendary', 'chaos', 'fire', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 10, 0, 0, 'Destroy ALL units, items, and locations on the field. Both players discard their hands. Each player draws 5 new cards. The game resets to a new reality.', 'The Architect, The CoNexus, and The Antiquarian converge at the moment reality collapses.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_018_realitys_end-jMxvs9GQdmb65op8gS2C5Y.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["apocalypse","reset"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl)
